PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend responding: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6NCwibmlrIjoiRU1QLTAwMiIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImVtcGxveWVlX2lkIjoyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzgwNjk5NjQsImV4cCI6MTc3ODE1NjM2NH0.jIv5Tq5uDrjjlkWTdz-HuXF2Z1J2A-gsG2Ha-Pmk3d8"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $body = '{"nama":"Test Kantor","tipe":"Kantor","status":true}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/facility/master/building" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body $body } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6NCwibmlrIjoiRU1QLTAwMiIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImVtcGxveWVlX2lkIjoyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzgwNjk5NjQsImV4cCI6MTc3ODE1NjM2NH0.jIv5Tq5uDrjjlkWTdz-HuXF2Z1J2A-gsG2Ha-Pmk3d8"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $body = '{"nama":"Test Kantor","tipe":"Kantor","status":true}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/facility/master/building" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body $body; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6NCwibmlrIjoiRU1QLTAwMiIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImVtcGxveWVlX2lkIjoyLCJpYXQiOjE3NzgwNjk5NjQsImV4cCI6MTc3ODE1NjM2NH0.jIv5Tq5uDrjjlkWTdz-HuXF2Z1J2A-gsG2Ha-Pmk3d8"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $body = '{"nama":"Test Kantor 2","tipe":"Kantor","status":"Aktif"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/facility/master/building" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body $body; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nik":"EMP-002","password":"password123"}'\).data.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $body = '{"nama":"Workshop Baru","tipe":"Workshop","kapasitas_total":50,"status":"Aktif"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/facility/master/building" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body $body; $response.data | Select-Object nama, tipe, kapasitas_total, status | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nik":"111111","password":"password123"}' -ErrorAction Stop; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Error: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)"; Write-Host "Full: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nik":"111111","password":"password123"}' -ErrorAction Stop; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)"; Write-Host "Full: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/company-settings" -ErrorAction Stop; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5173/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nik":"111111","password":"password123"}' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "SUCCESS"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MTUsIm5payI6IjExMTExMSIsInJvbGUiOiJzdXBlcmFkbWluIiwiZW1wbG95ZWVfaWQiOm51bGwsImlhdCI6MTc3ODE2MzE3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzc4MjQ5NTc4fQ.arDuzdxkkSJOr18LkYb20DGA0XMAY5NFaCOldCXqOOg"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/users" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Total users: $\($r.data.users.Count\)"; $r.data.users | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  NIK: $\($_.nik\) | Name: $\($_.nama\) | Role: $\($_.role_id\) | Active: $\($_.is_active\)" } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MTUsIm5payI6IjExMTExMSIsInJvbGUiOiJzdXBlcmFkbWluIiwiZW1wbG95ZWVfaWQiOm51bGwsImlhdCI6MTc3ODE2MzE3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzc4MjQ5NTc4fQ.arDuzdxkkSJOr18LkYb20DGA0XMAY5NFaCOldCXqOOg"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/users" -Headers $headers -ErrorAction Stop; $r.data | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nik":"111111","password":"password123"}' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Login SUCCESS - User: $\($r.data.user.nik\), Role: $\($r.data.user.roleDetails.name\)" } catch { Write-Host "Login FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
